title: FInd & Replace
excerpt: Would be great to have the feature to find & replace particular word in board (similar to Excel option).

posts.author: ZahidE (Zahid Ehsan)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to have the feature to find & replace particular word in board (similar to Excel option).

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Zahid,
If you have some experience the developing software, a workaround to find replace particular word would be to use the Monday API.
You can see some examples for manipulating Column data here

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ZahidE,

You can do this using the Toolkit app.
You can find more information about the app here

posts.author: sbrudzinski (Sebastian Brudziński)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

just letting you know that the find and replace feature is also available in our Quick Replace app. It works for monday board items and sub-items, as well as for workdocs. Feel free to give it a try - the app is free for up to 3 users and there’s a free, 14-days trial for higher user tiers.

obraz765×347 50.4 KB

posts.author: ZahidE (Zahid Ehsan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Such basic features should be by default part of Monday rather than need to subscribe 3rd party app. as value addition.
All Excel basic should be doable by Monday and for novelty feature 3rd party should be recommended.
